steps.description: Type text: 'coffee agent' into the search bar located at the top of the "Samples" tab within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.

Click the "Create" button for the "Coffee Engine Agent" sample in the "Featured samples" section within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension pane in Visual Studio Code.And input ${{var:app_name:coffee-agent}} into the run time variable.
Click the "Customize Your Order" button located under the "Current Order" section in the CoffeeAgentlocal chat interface within Microsoft Teams.
Type 'test' into the 'Your Name:' input field of the 'Submit Your Order' dialog box within the CoffeeAgentLocal interface in Microsoft Teams.
Click the "Submit Your Order" button located in the CoffeeAgentlocal form within the Microsoft Teams browser interface at coordinates (647, 476).
@assertion "Thanks for submitting your coffee order!" is exist
Click the "Close" button (red cross) at the top-right corner of the confirmation dialog box, labeled "Submit Your Order," in the CoffeeAgentLocal interface within Microsoft Teams.
